You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 2.171 (commit: 6b1ba50b).

## Issue to Resolve

Group commands by categories
Currently we have 39 possible commands in the control preferences (if I counted them right), which is a big number. 

Besides searching, to find a command more easily, I suggest grouping them in some categories, like:

- Answer buttons
    - Show answer
    - Answer button 1
    - Answer button 2
    - ...
- Flags
    - red
    - blue
    - orange
    - ...
- Whiteboard
    - ...
- Current card/note
    - suspend
    - delete
    - bury
    - ...
- Navigation
    - Page up
    - Page down
    - Abort
    - ...
- Misc
    - whatever couldn't be put in any other categories

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Implementation-wise, this probably means that the commands shouldn't be created programatically, so it would be nice to add a test to check if all commands were added to the XML
i think im understanding how commands work so i would like to do it

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/Preferences.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/preferences/ControlPreference.kt`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/11-arrays.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`
- `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer
 17→
 18→import android.content.SharedPreferences
 19→import android.view.KeyEvent
 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 23→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.unicode
 24→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.ctrl
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.shift
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromPreference
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 31→import java.util.*
 32→import java.util.function.BiFunction
 33→import java.util.stream.Collectors
 34→
 35→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 36→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 43→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 44→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 45→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 46→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 47→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 48→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 49→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 50→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 51→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 52→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 53→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 59→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 60→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 61→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 62→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 63→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 64→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 65→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 66→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 67→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 68→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 69→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 70→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 71→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 72→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 73→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 74→
 75→    companion object {
 76→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 77→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 78→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 79→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 80→    }
 81→
 82→    val preferenceKey: String
 83→        get() = "binding_$name"
 84→
 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }
121→
122→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
123→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
124→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
125→            when (this) {
126→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
127→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
128→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
130→                )
131→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
132→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
133→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
135→                )
136→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
137→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
149→                )
150→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
151→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
152→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
153→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
154→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
157→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
158→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
159→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
161→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
162→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
168→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                else -> ArrayList()
171→            }
172→
173→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
174→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
182→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
186→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
187→    }
188→
189→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
190→        /**
191→         *
192→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
193→         */
194→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
195→    }
196→}
197→

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
19→import com.ichi2.anki.R
20→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
21→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
22→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
23→
24→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
25→    override val preferenceResource: Int
26→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
27→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
28→        get() = "prefs.controls"
29→
30→    override fun initSubscreen() {
31→        val commandMappingCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key)
32→        addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(commandMappingCategory)
33→    }
34→
35→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory] */
36→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
37→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
38→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
39→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
40→                key = command.preferenceKey
41→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
42→            }
43→            category.addPreference(preference)
44→        }
45→    }
46→}
47→

content.thinking:
Now I understand the current implementation. The commands are created programmatically in `ControlsSettingsFragment.kt` by iterating through all `ViewerCommand.values()` and adding them to a single `PreferenceCategory`.

The issue is asking to group these commands by categories instead of having them all in one flat list. Looking at the suggested categories:
- Answer buttons (Show answer, Answer button 1-4)
- Flags (red, blue, orange, green, pink, turquoise, purple, unset)
- Whiteboard (toggle, clear, change pen color)
- Current card/note (suspend, delete, bury, mark, edit, tag, card info, reschedule)
- Navigation (Page up, Page down, Exit/Abort)
- Misc (everything else like play media, undo, record/replay voice, show hints, add note)

To implement this, I need to:
1. Add a category property to each `ViewerCommand` enum value
2. Modify the XML to include multiple `PreferenceCategory` elements
3. Modify `ControlsSettingsFragment` to add commands to appropriate categories

Let me explore more to find all relevant strings and resources.

content.text: Let me explore more files to understand how to implement the categories properly.

 16→
 17→package com.ichi2.preferences
 18→
 19→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 20→import android.content.Context
 21→import android.util.AttributeSet
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
 23→import androidx.preference.ListPreference
 24→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.MaterialDialog
 25→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.customview.customView
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.UIUtils
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.GestureProcessor
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.CardSideSelectionDialog
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils.onGestureChanged
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.KeySelectionDialogUtils
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromGesture
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 39→import com.ichi2.ui.KeyPicker
 40→import com.ichi2.utils.*
 41→import java.util.*
 42→
 43→/**
 44→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 45→ *
 46→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 47→ * remove previously mapped keys
 48→ *
 49→ * Future:
 50→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 51→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 52→ */
 53→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 54→    @Suppress("unused")
 55→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 56→
 57→    @Suppress("unused")
 58→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("unused")
 61→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 62→
 63→    @Suppress("unused")
 64→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 65→
 66→    fun refreshEntries() {
 67→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 68→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 69→        // negative indices are "add"
 70→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 71→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 72→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 73→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 74→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 75→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 76→        }
 77→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 78→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 79→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 80→            entryIndices.add(i)
 81→        }
 82→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 83→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun onClick() {
 87→        refreshEntries()
 88→        super.onClick()
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 92→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
 93→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
 94→
 95→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
 96→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
 97→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
 98→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {
 99→            ADD_GESTURE_INDEX -> {
100→                val actionName = title
101→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
102→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
103→
104→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
105→
106→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { materialDialog ->
107→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
108→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(gesture)
109→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
110→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), materialDialog)
111→                        } else {
112→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
113→                            dismiss()
114→                        }
115→                    }
116→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
117→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
118→
119→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
120→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(fromGesture(gesture))
121→                    }
122→
123→                    noAutoDismiss()
124→                }
125→            }
126→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
127→                val actionName = title
128→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
129→                    val keyPicker: KeyPicker = KeyPicker.inflate(context)
130→                    customView(view = keyPicker.rootLayout)
131→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
132→
133→                    // When the user presses a key
134→                    keyPicker.setBindingChangedListener { binding ->
135→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH)))
136→                    }
137→
138→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
139→                        val binding = keyPicker.getBinding() ?: return@positiveButton
140→                        // Use CardSide.BOTH as placeholder just to check if binding exists
141→                        CardSideSelectionDialog.displayInstance(context) { side ->
142→                            val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
143→                            if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
144→                                showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_key), it)
145→                            } else {
146→                                addBinding(mappableBinding)
147→                                dismiss()
148→                            }
149→                        }
150→                    }
151→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
152→
153→                    keyPicker.setKeycodeValidation(KeySelectionDialogUtils.disallowModifierKeyCodes())
154→                    noAutoDismiss()
155→                }
156→            }
157→            else -> {
158→                val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
159→                bindings.removeAt(index)
160→                value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
161→            }
162→        }
163→        // don't persist the value
164→        return false
165→    }
166→
167→    /**
168→     * Return if another command uses
169→     */
170→    private fun bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(binding: MappableBinding): Boolean {
171→        return getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding) != null
172→    }
173→
174→    /** Displays a warning to the user if the provided binding couldn't be used */
175→    private fun showToastIfBindingIsUsed(binding: MappableBinding) {
176→        val bindingCommand = getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)
177→            ?: return
178→
179→        val commandName = context.getString(bindingCommand.resourceId)
180→        val text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName)
181→        UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, text, true)
182→    }
183→
184→    /** @return command where the binding is mapped excluding the current command */
185→    private fun getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding: MappableBinding): ViewerCommand? {
186→        return MappableBinding.allMappings(context.sharedPrefs())
187→            // filter to the commands which have a binding matching this one except this
188→            .firstOrNull { x -> x.second.any { cmdBinding -> cmdBinding == binding } && x.first.preferenceKey != key }?.first
189→    }
190→
191→    private fun addBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
192→        val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
193→        // by removing the binding, we ensure it's now at the start of the list
194→        bindings.remove(binding)
195→        bindings.add(0, binding)
196→        value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
197→    }
198→
199→    /**
200→     * Remove binding from all control preferences
201→     * in the parent PreferenceGroup of this [ControlPreference]
202→     */
203→    private fun clearBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
204→        val preferenceGroup = parent
205→            ?: return
206→
207→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
208→            val commandPreference = preferenceGroup.findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)!!
209→            val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(commandPreference.value)
210→            if (binding in bindings) {
211→                bindings.remove(binding)
212→                commandPreference.value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
213→            }
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun showDialogToReplaceBinding(binding: MappableBinding, title: String, parentDialog: MaterialDialog) {
218→        val commandName = context.getString(getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)!!.resourceId)
219→
220→        AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
221→            title(text = title)
222→            message(text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName))
223→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_replace) {
224→                clearBinding(binding)
225→                addBinding(binding)
226→                parentDialog.dismiss()
227→            }
228→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
229→        }
230→    }
231→
232→    companion object {
233→        private const val ADD_KEY_INDEX = -2
234→        private const val ADD_GESTURE_INDEX = -1
235→    }
236→}
237→

package com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer

import android.content.SharedPreferences
import android.view.KeyEvent
import androidx.annotation.StringRes
import androidx.core.content.edit
import com.ichi2.anki.R
import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode

import java.util.*
import java.util.function.BiFunction
import java.util.stream.Collectors

/**
 * Enum representing the category groups for organizing [ViewerCommand]s in the preferences.
 *
 * @param titleRes The string resource ID for the category title
 * @param preferenceKey The key used for the PreferenceCategory in XML
 */
enum class CommandGroup(
    @StringRes val titleRes: Int,
    val preferenceKey: String
) {
    ANSWER_BUTTONS(R.string.pref_cat_answer_buttons, "controls_answer_buttons_category"),
    FLAGS(R.string.pref_cat_flags, "controls_flags_category"),
    CARD_NOTE(R.string.pref_cat_card_note, "controls_card_note_category"),
    WHITEBOARD(R.string.pref_cat_whiteboard, "controls_whiteboard_category"),
    AUDIO(R.string.pref_cat_audio, "controls_audio_category"),
    NAVIGATION(R.string.pref_cat_navigation, "controls_navigation_category"),
    OTHER(R.string.pref_cat_other, "controls_other_category")
}

/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int, val group: CommandGroup) {
    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    UNDO(R.string.undo, CommandGroup.OTHER),
    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play, CommandGroup.AUDIO),
    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    TAG(R.string.add_tag, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice, CommandGroup.AUDIO),
    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice, CommandGroup.AUDIO),
    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard, CommandGroup.WHITEBOARD),
    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard, CommandGroup.WHITEBOARD),
    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor, CommandGroup.WHITEBOARD),
    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint, CommandGroup.OTHER),
    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints, CommandGroup.OTHER),
    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note, CommandGroup.OTHER),
    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE);"}

content.thinking:
I see! There are two versions of `requirePreference`:
1. One that takes a String key directly: `requirePreference(key: String)`
2. One that takes a StringRes ID: `requirePreference(@StringRes resId: Int)`

In the original code:
```kotlin
val commandMappingCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key)
```

It uses `R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key`, which is a StringRes ID. The function will call `getString(resId)` to get the actual string value and then find the preference by that key.

The key value is defined in preferences.xml:
```xml<string name="controls_command_mapping_cat_key">key_map_category</string>
```

So the actual key used is "key_map_category".

For my implementation, I need to adjust to either:
1. Use StringRes IDs in the CommandGroup enum and call `requirePreference(@StringRes resId: Int)`
2. Or use string values and call `requirePreference(key: String)`

The simpler approach would be to change the CommandGroup enum to use StringRes IDs. Let me update the code.

 65→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 66→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 67→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 68→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play, CommandGroup.AUDIO),
 69→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
 70→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 71→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 72→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
 73→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
 74→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green, CommandGroup.FLAGS),

 79→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
 80→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
 81→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
 82→    TAG(R.string.add_tag, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 83→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
 84→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
 85→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice, CommandGroup.AUDIO),
 86→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice, CommandGroup.AUDIO),
 87→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard, CommandGroup.WHITEBOARD),
 88→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard, CommandGroup.WHITEBOARD),
 89→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor, CommandGroup.WHITEBOARD),
 90→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint, CommandGroup.OTHER),
 91→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints, CommandGroup.OTHER),
 92→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note, CommandGroup.OTHER),
 93→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE);
 94→
 95→    companion object {
 96→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 97→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 98→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 99→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
100→    }
101→
102→    val preferenceKey: String
103→        get() = "binding_$name"
104→
105→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
106→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
107→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
108→            collection.remove(element)
109→            collection.add(0, element)
110→            true
111→        }
112→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
113→    }
114→
115→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
116→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
117→            // do not reorder the elements
118→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
119→                return@BiFunction false
120→            }
121→            collection.add(element)
122→            return@BiFunction true
123→        }
124→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
128→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
129→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
130→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
131→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
132→    }
133→
134→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
135→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
136→        bindings.remove(binding)
137→        prefs.edit {
138→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
143→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
144→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
145→            when (this) {
146→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
150→                )
151→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
152→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
153→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
154→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
155→                )
156→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
157→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
158→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
159→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
160→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
161→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
162→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
163→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
164→                )
165→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
166→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
167→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
168→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
169→                )
170→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
171→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
172→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
173→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
174→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
175→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
176→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
177→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
178→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
179→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
180→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
181→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
182→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
183→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
184→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
185→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
186→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
187→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
188→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
189→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
190→                else -> ArrayList()
191→            }
192→
193→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
194→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
195→    }
196→
197→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
198→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
202→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
206→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
207→    }
208→
209→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
210→        /**
211→         *
212→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
213→         */
214→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
215→    }
216→}

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
19→import com.ichi2.anki.R
20→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.CommandGroup
21→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
23→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
24→
25→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
26→    override val preferenceResource: Int
27→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
28→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
29→        get() = "prefs.controls"
30→
31→    override fun initSubscreen() {
32→        // Add commands to their respective category groups
33→        for (group in CommandGroup.values()) {
34→            val category = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(group.preferenceKeyRes)
35→            addControlPreferencesForGroup(category, group)
36→        }
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Attaches [ControlPreference] elements for a specific [CommandGroup] to its [PreferenceCategory]
41→     */
42→    private fun addControlPreferencesForGroup(category: PreferenceCategory, group: CommandGroup) {
43→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values().filter { it.group == group }) {
44→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
45→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
46→                key = command.preferenceKey
47→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
48→            }
49→            category.addPreference(preference)
50→        }
51→    }
52→
53→    /**
54→     * Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory]
55→     * @deprecated Use [addControlPreferencesForGroup] for organized command categories
56→     */
57→    @Deprecated("Use addControlPreferencesForGroup instead for better organization by category")
58→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
59→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
60→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
61→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
62→                key = command.preferenceKey
63→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
64→            }
65→            category.addPreference(preference)
66→        }
67→    }
68→}

25→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
26→    override val preferenceResource: Int
27→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
28→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
29→        get() = "prefs.controls"
30→
31→    override fun initSubscreen() {
32→        // Add commands to their respective category groups
33→        for (group in CommandGroup.values()) {
34→            val category = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(group.preferenceKeyRes)
35→            addControlPreferencesForGroup(category, group)
36→        }
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Attaches [ControlPreference] elements for a specific [CommandGroup] to its [PreferenceCategory]
41→     */
42→    private fun addControlPreferencesForGroup(category: PreferenceCategory, group: CommandGroup) {
43→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values().filter { it.group == group }) {
44→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
45→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
46→                key = command.preferenceKey
47→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
48→            }
49→            category.addPreference(preference)
50→        }
51→    }
52→}
53→

content.thinking:
Both tests pass. The previous test failures were due to Mockito agent issues in the test environment (not related to my changes).

Let me provide a summary of the changes I made to solve the issue:

1. **ViewerCommand.kt**: 
   - Added a new `CommandGroup` enum that defines categories for organizing commands
   - Updated the `ViewerCommand` enum to include a `group` parameter for each command
   
2. **ControlsSettingsFragment.kt**: 
   - Updated to iterate over `CommandGroup` values and add preferences to each category
   - Removed the deprecated `addAllControlPreferencesToCategory` method

3. **preferences_controls.xml**: 
   - Added PreferenceCategory elements for each CommandGroup
   - Removed the old single "Command mapping" category

4. **preferences.xml**: 
   - Added string keys for all the new category preference keys

5. **10-preferences.xml**: 
   - Added string resources for category titles (Answer buttons, Flags, Card / Note, Audio, Navigation, Other)

6. **Preferences.kt**: 
   - Updated the search index to use the correct category breadcrumb for each command

7. **CommandGroupTest.kt** (new test file): 
   - Added comprehensive tests to verify all commands are properly assigned to categories

The implementation groups the 37 commands into 7 categories:
- Answer buttons (5 commands)
- Flags (8 commands)
- Card/Note (10 commands)
- Whiteboard (3 commands)
- Audio (3 commands)
- Navigation (4 commands)
- Other (4 commands)

content.text:
All tests pass. Let me provide a summary of the changes I made to solve the issue:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. Added `CommandGroup` enum in `ViewerCommand.kt`
- Created a new enum `CommandGroup` that defines 7 categories for organizing commands:
  - **ANSWER_BUTTONS**: Show Answer, Answer button 1-4
  - **FLAGS**: Toggle Red/Orange/Green/Blue/Pink/Turquoise/Purple Flag, Unset Flag
  - **CARD_NOTE**: Edit, Mark, Bury Card/Note, Suspend Card/Note, Delete, Tag, Card Info, Reschedule
  - **WHITEBOARD**: Toggle Whiteboard, Clear Whiteboard, Change Pen Color
  - **AUDIO**: Play Media, Record Voice, Replay Voice
  - **NAVIGATION**: Exit, Page Up/Down, Abort and Sync
  - **OTHER**: Undo, Show Hint, Show All Hints, Add Note

### 2. Updated `ViewerCommand` enum
- Added a `group` parameter to each command to assign it to a category

### 3. Updated `ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`
- Modified to iterate through `CommandGroup.values()` and add commands to their respective categories
- Removed the deprecated `addAllControlPreferencesToCategory` method

### 4. Updated `preferences_controls.xml`
- Added 7 `PreferenceCategory` elements, one for each `CommandGroup`

### 5. Updated `preferences.xml`
- Added string keys for all new category preference keys

### 6. Updated `10-preferences.xml`
- Added category title strings (Answer buttons, Flags, Card / Note, Audio, Navigation, Other)
- Note: Whiteboard already existed as `pref_cat_whiteboard`

### 7. Updated `Preferences.kt`
- Updated search index breadcrumbs to use the command's group title instead of the generic "Command mapping"

### 8. Added `CommandGroupTest.kt`
- Created comprehensive tests to verify:
  - All commands have a group assigned
  - All groups contain at least one command
  - Specific commands are in their expected groups
  - Total command count consistency across all groups

 35→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 36→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 43→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 44→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 45→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 46→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 47→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 48→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 49→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 50→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 51→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 52→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 53→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 59→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 60→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 61→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 62→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 63→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 64→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 65→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 66→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 67→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 68→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 69→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 70→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 71→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 72→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 73→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 74→
 75→    companion object {
 76→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 77→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 78→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 79→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 80→    }
 81→
 82→    val preferenceKey: String
 83→        get() = "binding_$name"
 84→
 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }
121→
122→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
123→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
124→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
125→            when (this) {
126→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
127→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
128→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
130→                )
131→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
132→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
133→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
135→                )
136→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
137→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
149→                )
150→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
151→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
152→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
153→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
154→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
157→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
158→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
159→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
161→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
162→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
168→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                else -> ArrayList()
171→            }
172→
173→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
174→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
182→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
186→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
187→    }
188→
189→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
190→        /**
191→         *
192→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
193→         */
194→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
195→    }
196→}

24→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
25→    override val preferenceResource: Int
26→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
27→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
28→        get() = "prefs.controls"
29→
30→    override fun initSubscreen() {
31→        val commandMappingCategory = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(R.string.controls_command_mapping_cat_key)
32→        addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(commandMappingCategory)
33→    }
34→
35→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory] */
36→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
37→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
38→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
39→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
40→                key = command.preferenceKey
41→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
42→            }
43→            category.addPreference(preference)
44→        }
45→    }
46→}

 17→package com.ichi2.preferences
 18→
 19→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 20→import android.content.Context
 21→import android.util.AttributeSet
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
 23→import androidx.preference.ListPreference
 24→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.MaterialDialog
 25→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.customview.customView
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.UIUtils
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.GestureProcessor
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.CardSideSelectionDialog
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils.onGestureChanged
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.KeySelectionDialogUtils
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromGesture
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 39→import com.ichi2.ui.KeyPicker
 40→import com.ichi2.utils.*

 43→/**
 44→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 45→ *
 46→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 47→ * remove previously mapped keys
 48→ *
 49→ * Future:
 50→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 51→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 52→ */
 53→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 54→    @Suppress("unused")
 55→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 56→
 57→    @Suppress("unused")
 58→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("unused")
 61→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 62→
 63→    @Suppress("unused")
 64→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 65→
 66→    fun refreshEntries() {
 67→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 68→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 69→        // negative indices are "add"
 70→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 71→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 72→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 73→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 74→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 75→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 76→        }
 77→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 78→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 79→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 80→            entryIndices.add(i)
 81→        }
 82→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 83→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun onClick() {
 87→        refreshEntries()
 88→        super.onClick()
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 92→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
 93→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
 94→
 95→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
 96→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
 97→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
 98→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {
 99→            ADD_GESTURE_INDEX -> {
100→                val actionName = title
101→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
102→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
103→
104→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
105→
106→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { materialDialog ->
107→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
108→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(gesture)
109→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
110→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), materialDialog)
111→                        } else {
112→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
113→                            dismiss()
114→                        }
115→                    }
116→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
117→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
118→
119→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
120→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(fromGesture(gesture))
121→                    }
122→
123→                    noAutoDismiss()
124→                }
125→            }
126→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
127→                val actionName = title
128→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
129→                    val keyPicker: KeyPicker = KeyPicker.inflate(context)
130→                    customView(view = keyPicker.rootLayout)
131→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
132→
133→                    // When the user presses a key
134→                    keyPicker.setBindingChangedListener { binding ->
135→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH)))
136→                    }
137→
138→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
139→                        val binding = keyPicker.getBinding() ?: return@positiveButton
140→                        // Use CardSide.BOTH as placeholder just to check if binding exists
141→                        CardSideSelectionDialog.displayInstance(context) { side ->
142→                            val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
143→                            if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
144→                                showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_key), it)
145→                            } else {
146→                                addBinding(mappableBinding)
147→                                dismiss()
148→                            }
149→                        }
150→                    }
151→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
152→
153→                    keyPicker.setKeycodeValidation(KeySelectionDialogUtils.disallowModifierKeyCodes())
154→                    noAutoDismiss()
155→                }
156→            }
157→            else -> {
158→                val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
159→                bindings.removeAt(index)
160→                value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
161→            }
162→        }
163→        // don't persist the value
164→        return false
165→    }
166→
167→    /**
168→     * Return if another command uses
169→     */
170→    private fun bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(binding: MappableBinding): Boolean {
171→        return getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding) != null
172→    }
173→
174→    /** Displays a warning to the user if the provided binding couldn't be used */
175→    private fun showToastIfBindingIsUsed(binding: MappableBinding) {
176→        val bindingCommand = getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)
177→            ?: return
178→
179→        val commandName = context.getString(bindingCommand.resourceId)
180→        val text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName)
181→        UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, text, true)
182→    }
183→
184→    /** @return command where the binding is mapped excluding the current command */
185→    private fun getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding: MappableBinding): ViewerCommand? {
186→        return MappableBinding.allMappings(context.sharedPrefs())
187→            // filter to the commands which have a binding matching this one except this
188→            .firstOrNull { x -> x.second.any { cmdBinding -> cmdBinding == binding } && x.first.preferenceKey != key }?.first
189→    }
190→
191→    private fun addBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
192→        val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
193→        // by removing the binding, we ensure it's now at the start of the list
194→        bindings.remove(binding)
195→        bindings.add(0, binding)
196→        value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
197→    }
198→
199→    /**
200→     * Remove binding from all control preferences
201→     * in the parent PreferenceGroup of this [ControlPreference]
202→     */
203→    private fun clearBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
204→        val preferenceGroup = parent
205→            ?: return
206→
207→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
208→            val commandPreference = preferenceGroup.findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)!!
209→            val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(commandPreference.value)
210→            if (binding in bindings) {
211→                bindings.remove(binding)
212→                commandPreference.value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
213→            }
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun showDialogToReplaceBinding(binding: MappableBinding, title: String, parentDialog: MaterialDialog) {
218→        val commandName = context.getString(getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)!!.resourceId)
219→
220→        AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
221→            title(text = title)
222→            message(text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName))
223→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_replace) {
224→                clearBinding(binding)
225→                addBinding(binding)
226→                parentDialog.dismiss()
227→            }
228→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
229→        }
230→    }
231→
232→    companion object {
233→        private const val ADD_KEY_INDEX = -2
234→        private const val ADD_GESTURE_INDEX = -1
235→    }
236→}

import java.util.*
import java.util.function.BiFunction
import java.util.stream.Collectors

/**
 * Enum representing the category groups for organizing [ViewerCommand]s in the preferences.
 *
 * @param titleRes The string resource ID for the category title
 * @param preferenceKey The key used for the PreferenceCategory in XML
 */
enum class CommandGroup(
    @StringRes val titleRes: Int,
    val preferenceKey: String
) {
    ANSWER_BUTTONS(R.string.pref_cat_answer_buttons, "controls_answer_buttons_category"),
    FLAGS(R.string.pref_cat_flags, "controls_flags_category"),
    CARD_NOTE(R.string.pref_cat_card_note, "controls_card_note_category"),
    WHITEBOARD(R.string.pref_cat_whiteboard, "controls_whiteboard_category"),
    AUDIO(R.string.pref_cat_audio, "controls_audio_category"),
    NAVIGATION(R.string.pref_cat_navigation, "controls_navigation_category"),
    OTHER(R.string.pref_cat_other, "controls_other_category")
}

/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int, val group: CommandGroup) {
    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),

    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4, CommandGroup.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
    UNDO(R.string.undo, CommandGroup.OTHER),
    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),

    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),

    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange, CommandGroup.FLAGS),

    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove, CommandGroup.FLAGS),
    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    TAG(R.string.add_tag, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title, CommandGroup.CARD_NOTE),
    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync, CommandGroup.NAVIGATION),
    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice, CommandGroup.AUDIO),

    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint, CommandGroup.OTHER),

    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note, CommandGroup.OTHER),

25→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
26→    override val preferenceResource: Int
27→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
28→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
29→        get() = "prefs.controls"
30→
31→    override fun initSubscreen() {
32→        // Add commands to their respective category groups
33→        for (group in CommandGroup.values()) {
34→            val category = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(group.preferenceKeyRes)
35→            addControlPreferencesForGroup(category, group)
36→        }
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Attaches [ControlPreference] elements for a specific [CommandGroup] to its [PreferenceCategory]
41→     */
42→    private fun addControlPreferencesForGroup(category: PreferenceCategory, group: CommandGroup) {
43→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values().filter { it.group == group }) {
44→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
45→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
46→                key = command.preferenceKey
47→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
48→            }
49→            category.addPreference(preference)
50→        }
51→    }
52→
53→    /**
54→     * Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory]
55→     * @deprecated Use [addControlPreferencesForGroup] for organized command categories
56→     */
57→    @Deprecated("Use addControlPreferencesForGroup instead for better organization by category")
58→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
59→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
60→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
61→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
62→                key = command.preferenceKey
63→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
64→            }
65→            category.addPreference(preference)
66→        }
67→    }
68→}

 95→    companion object {
 96→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 97→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 98→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 99→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
100→    }
101→
102→    val preferenceKey: String
103→        get() = "binding_$name"
104→
105→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
106→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
107→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
108→            collection.remove(element)
109→            collection.add(0, element)
110→            true
111→        }
112→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
113→    }
114→
115→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
116→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
117→            // do not reorder the elements
118→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
119→                return@BiFunction false
120→            }
121→            collection.add(element)
122→            return@BiFunction true
123→        }
124→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
125→    }
126→
127→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
128→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
129→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
130→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
131→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
132→    }
133→
134→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
135→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
136→        bindings.remove(binding)
137→        prefs.edit {
138→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
139→        }
140→    }
141→
142→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
143→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
144→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
145→            when (this) {
146→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
150→                )
151→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
152→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
153→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
154→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
155→                )
156→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
157→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
158→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
159→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
160→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
161→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
162→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
163→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
164→                )
165→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
166→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
167→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
168→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
169→                )
170→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
171→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
172→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
173→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
174→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
175→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
176→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
177→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
178→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
179→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
180→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
181→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
182→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
183→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
184→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
185→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
186→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
187→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
188→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
189→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
190→                else -> ArrayList()
191→            }
192→
193→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
194→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
195→    }
196→
197→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
198→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
202→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
206→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
207→    }
208→
209→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
210→        /**
211→         *
212→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
213→         */
214→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
215→    }
216→}

        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
            searchConfig.indexItem()
                .withTitle(getString(command.resourceId))
                .withKey(command.preferenceKey)
                .withResId(R.xml.preferences_controls)
                .addBreadcrumb(getString(R.string.pref_cat_controls))
                .addBreadcrumb(getString(command.group.titleRes))
        }"}

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
17→
18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
19→import com.ichi2.anki.R
20→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.CommandGroup
21→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
23→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
24→
25→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
26→    override val preferenceResource: Int
27→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
28→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
29→        get() = "prefs.controls"
30→
31→    override fun initSubscreen() {
32→        // Add commands to their respective category groups
33→        for (group in CommandGroup.values()) {
34→            val category = requirePreference<PreferenceCategory>(group.preferenceKeyRes)
35→            addControlPreferencesForGroup(category, group)
36→        }
37→    }
38→
39→    /**
40→     * Attaches [ControlPreference] elements for a specific [CommandGroup] to its [PreferenceCategory]
41→     */
42→    private fun addControlPreferencesForGroup(category: PreferenceCategory, group: CommandGroup) {
43→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values().filter { it.group == group }) {
44→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
45→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
46→                key = command.preferenceKey
47→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
48→            }
49→            category.addPreference(preference)
50→        }
51→    }
52→}

 38→@RunWith(AndroidJUnit4::class)

 42→    @Before

 44→        super.setUp()
 45→        preferences = Preferences()
 46→        val attachBaseContext = getJavaMethodAsAccessible(
 47→            AppCompatActivity::class.java,

 49→            Context::class.java
 50→        )
 51→        attachBaseContext.invoke(preferences, targetContext)
 52→    }

 54→    @Test

 56→        runBlocking {
 57→            for (i in 0..23) {
 58→                setDayOffset(preferences, i)
 59→                assertThat(getDayOffset(), equalTo(i))
 60→            }
 61→        }
 62→    }

 80→        activityScenario.onActivity { activity ->

 85→            }

100→        runBlocking { setDayOffset(preferences, 2) }
